tweets.text:
NEW: DHS tells @FoxNews ICE arrested a handful of egregious criminal aliens yesterday, including an illegal alien from Sierra Leone convicted of raping an 11-year-old Maryland girl 15 times in a 5 month span in 2014, and a Venezuelan illegal alien w/ six felony convictions in MD including armed robbery, handgun use during a felony, first degree assault, and drug distribution.

Additional arrests include a Guatemalan illegal alien convicted of unlawful sexual contact with a minor in Pennsylvania, and a Salvadoran illegal alien convicted of intoxication assault with a vehicle causing serious bodily injury in Harris County, TX after he crashed his box truck into the back of a car at a red light while drunk, injuring six children, one of whom was sent to the ICU with a fractured skull.

Mohammed Sesay/Sierra Leone (top left)
Jose David Contreras-Sierra/ Venezuela (top right)
Pablo Tahay-Par/Guatemala (bottom left)
Alex Ventura/El Salvador (bottom right)

author.description: Congressional correspondent for @foxnews in DC. 4x EMMY winner, 3x Edward R. Murrow winner, 4x RTNA Golden Mike winner. @Cronkite_ASU grad & SoCal native.

tweets.text:
NEW: DHS announces that a Senegalese illegal alien who was caught and released at the border by the Biden admin in October 2023 has now been arrested & charged federally for trying to stab ICE officers and other ICE detainees with a pair of scissors at 26 Federal Plaza in NYC during immigration processing. ICE officers disarmed him 

Bass Ndiaye has now been charged federally with one count of assaulting a federal officer using a deadly or dangerous weapon, which carries a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison.
